对比与转折句式: Compared to traditional single-person motion prediction, multi-person motion prediction is more practical as people are mostly associated with a group and interacting with each other.

While encouraging results are shown in the Transformer-based methods, those previous works only implicitly learn the inter-joint relation through the attention mechanism and lack the explicit awareness of skeleton structure.
But even with this robustness, pyramids are still needed to get the most accurate results.
问题导向与动机句式: Multi-person motion prediction is a challenging problem due to the dependency of motion on both individual past movements and interactions with other people.
Recognizing objects at vastly different scales is a fundamental challenge in computer vision.
Thus, automaton design remains restricted to only a handful of experts.
方法提出与贡献句式: In this paper, we propose the Joint-Relation Transformer, which utilizes relation information to enhance interaction modeling and improve future motion prediction.

We propose an automatic algorithm that takes a motion sequence of a humanoid character and generates the design for a mechanical figure that approximates the input motion when driven with a single input crank.
A top-down architecture with lateral connections is developed for building high-level semantic feature maps at all scales.

段落组织.段落开头引入方式: 多采用“任务定义/背景陈述”或“现有工作回顾”直接切入。例如以“Multi-person motion prediction aims to...”明确任务目标，或以“Previous works on... generally adopt...”梳理技术脉络，亦或用“Recognizing objects at vastly different scales is a fundamental challenge...”点明核心痛点。
段落组织.段内论证逻辑: 呈现严密的“递进与剥洋葱”逻辑。通常遵循“陈述现状/主流方法 → 剖析内在缺陷/局限性（如计算代价、语义鸿沟、隐式学习） → 引出本文动机与具体设计”的链条。在方法阐述段落，则采用“机制描述 → 理论优势 → 最终效果”的演绎逻辑。
段落组织.段落结尾收束方式: 常以“总结性评价”或“实验/结果预告”收尾，以强化本段论点并为下文铺垫。例如“The quantitative results show we outperform the previous methods...”直接宣告SOTA结果，或“We show that these are important for detecting small objects.”点出关键发现以引出后续的网络设计。

用词特征: 过渡词 (Transition Words): Moreover, Additionally, However, Nevertheless, Thus, Therefore, In specific, Compared to/with, While.
强调词 (Emphasis Words): crucial, fundamental, significant, inherent, explicit, promising, state-of-the-art, vastly, heavily, largely, marginal.
限定词 (Qualifier Words): partially, mostly, generally, only, relatively, practically, inherently.
学术动词与短语 (Academic Verbs/Phrases): exploit, leverage, formulate, approximate, outperform, pave a path to, suffer from, adhere to, forego, offset.
论证模式: “提出问题 → 分析现有方案局限 → 给出本文方案”模式：Introduction的核心逻辑。先指出任务难点（如多人交互依赖、多尺度检测的计算代价），接着剖析主流方法（如GNN的过平滑、标准Transformer缺乏显式结构感知、图像金字塔的内存瓶颈）的缺陷，最后顺理成章提出本文的针对性架构（Joint-Relation Transformer / FPN）。
“先总后分（总览框架 → 模块拆解）”模式：在Abstract和Method概述中，先宏观概括提出的系统（如“Our approach has two stages”或“a two-stream Transformer architecture”），随后逐一拆解子模块的具体功能与数学/物理约束（如motion approximation stage / layout stage）。
“机制设计 → 属性推导 → 性能增益”推导模式：在解释创新点时，先描述具体操作（如引入relation-aware attention），然后推导其满足的物理/数学属性（如translation and rotation invariant），最后落脚于对模型性能的实际提升（如enhancing prediction performance）。

引用风格.引用的嵌入方式:
1. 句末/词末上标引用（主流）：用于支持特定事实、应用场景或数据集，不打断阅读流畅度。如“autonomous driving<sup>15, 38, 10, 51</sup>”、“3DPW-SoMoF<sup>3</sup>”。
2. 句中/主语紧跟引用：将特定算法、模型或文献作为句子主语或核心宾语时，引用紧随其后。如“The Single Shot Detector (SSD)<sup>22</sup> is one of the first attempts...”、“object detectors like DPM<sup>7</sup> required...”。
引用风格.引用与论述的衔接方式:
1. 归类与枚举式衔接：将多篇文献按应用领域或技术流派进行打包引用，以证明研究的广泛价值或技术路线的普遍性。如“including autonomous driving<sup>15, 38, 10, 51</sup>, surveillance systems<sup>13, 42, 52</sup> and healthcare monitoring<sup>43</sup>”。
2. 对比与转折式衔接：在列举代表性工作后，立刻使用转折词（however, while, but）指出其局限性，从而为本文方法的出现构建“Gap”。如“...such as MRT<sup>46</sup> and SoMoFormer<sup>40</sup>, treat temporal sequence... Compared with GNN-based methods, Transformer has shown...”。
